channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra teardown reveals the clever camera tech Unpacked skipped
item.description: A teardown shows the Galaxy S26 Ultra packs smarter hardware upgrades, including a brighter zoom camera, larger cooling system, and improved S Pen protection.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: The blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra with its S Pen sticking out of the sheath
media:content.media:text: The blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra with its S Pen sticking out of the sheath
media:content.media:title: The blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra with its S Pen sticking out of the sheath

item.title: I’ve spent years forgetting to turn off my phone's focus modes, but One UI 8.5 finally fixes that
item.description: One UI 8.5 finally lets you set expiration dates on Samsung routines, so temporary automations actually know when to quit.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26 display
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26 display
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26 display

item.title: 100x zoom on the Pixel 10 Pro has a new name — and it makes me wonder why it wasn't always this
item.description: "Pro Zoom" is what it should've been called from day one.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central

item.title: Google Store's new Pixel charging dock does one thing most 3-in-1 chargers don't
item.description: Wasserstein's new Google Pixel charging dock powers a phone, watch, and earbuds at the same time.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The official Google Pixelsnap Qi2 wireless charger and dock for the Google Pixel 10 series
media:content.media:text: The official Google Pixelsnap Qi2 wireless charger and dock for the Google Pixel 10 series
media:content.media:title: The official Google Pixelsnap Qi2 wireless charger and dock for the Google Pixel 10 series

item.title: Lucky number seven? Samsung drops yet another Galaxy S25 One UI 8.5 beta
item.description: Samsung was spotted pushing a seventh One UI 8.5 beta to its year-old flagships overseas.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Updating to One UI 8 on a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Updating to One UI 8 on a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Updating to One UI 8 on a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra

item.title: Samsung 'concerned' over potential mobile business losses due to memory costs
item.description: Samsung was reported to have been growing "concerned" over potential losses due to the rising costs of memory and more.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung logo at CES 2019
media:content.media:text: Samsung logo at CES 2019
media:content.media:title: Samsung logo at CES 2019

item.title: With the Deco BE65 Pro, I finally found a mesh Wi-Fi 7 router that I like
item.description: TP-Link's Deco BE65 Pro is a Wi-Fi 7 mesh router system that's actually great to use. With extensive configurability and an elegant design, this is a good upgrade if you want a new router.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: TP-Link Deco BE65 Pro review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: TP-Link Deco BE65 Pro review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: TP-Link Deco BE65 Pro review on Android Central

item.title: Holy crap! The Galaxy S26 Ultra just ordered dinner and tea for me and all I had to do was hit 'Confirm'
item.description: Automation just hit the next level with Gemini and the Galaxy S26 Ultra, and now you can ask it to order your next meal, tea, Uber, and soon even groceries.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Asking Gemini to order a tea from Starbucks for me on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Asking Gemini to order a tea from Starbucks for me on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Asking Gemini to order a tea from Starbucks for me on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: Google just gave Gemini the power to control apps on the Galaxy S26 — and it's pretty wild
item.description: Google Gemini can now control apps on the Galaxy S26 to complete multi-step tasks.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26 with its display turned on and showing the One UI 8.5 home screen
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26 with its display turned on and showing the One UI 8.5 home screen
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26 with its display turned on and showing the One UI 8.5 home screen

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra vs. Xiaomi 17 Ultra: Brand perception is everything
item.description: The Galaxy S26 Ultra is a productivity powerhouse but there's no ignoring the Xiaomi 17 Ultra's incredible cameras and battery life. Which $1,000+ phone should you bet on?
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: The blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra with its S Pen sticking out of the sheath
media:content.media:text: The blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra with its S Pen sticking out of the sheath
media:content.media:title: The blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra with its S Pen sticking out of the sheath

item.title: This is the best spy game I've played since GoldenEye 007, and everyone is sleeping on it
item.description: Unseen Diplomacy 2 is the most unique and probably full-fledged spy game I've ever played, and its $16 price tag makes it even more attractive.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Trying to grab a fake diamond between a grid of lasers in Unseen Diplomacy 2 on Meta Quest 3
media:content.media:text: Trying to grab a fake diamond between a grid of lasers in Unseen Diplomacy 2 on Meta Quest 3
media:content.media:title: Trying to grab a fake diamond between a grid of lasers in Unseen Diplomacy 2 on Meta Quest 3

item.title: 6G is coming, and these are 3 things you'll be able to do with it
item.description: 6G will be here before you know it, and Qualcomm and Nvidia have already shared their plans for the new connectivity tech. Here's what you need to know.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Qualcomm 6G keynote at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:text: The Qualcomm 6G keynote at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:title: The Qualcomm 6G keynote at MWC 2026.

item.title: These unique clip-on earbuds from Anker just scored a 35% discount — but it may not last long
item.description: Open-ear for optimal comfort; plus a sleek design.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Anker Aeroclip earbuds on stone surface
media:content.media:text: Anker Aeroclip earbuds on stone surface
media:content.media:title: Anker Aeroclip earbuds on stone surface

item.title: 'Immersive Navigation' in Google Maps is like opening a new app for the modern era of driving
item.description: Google Maps announced its largest update in a decade, as it completely reworks the driving experience with Immersive Navigation.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Google Maps logo and "You've arrived" text at the Google Maps Street View Garage entrance

item.title: Verizon has extended the deal that gets you a FREE Galaxy S26 Plus, but you're running out of time
item.description: The preorder period is over, but one of the best Galaxy S26 deals is still going strong.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

item.title: Elevate your Galaxy S26 Ultra photography game with these two easy changes you can make now
item.description: Take your photos from trash-tier to S-tier by disabling this one Galaxy S26 camera setting that's a little too aggressive for its own good.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Taking a photo of peach blossoms with a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Taking a photo of peach blossoms with a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Taking a photo of peach blossoms with a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: Motorola Razr 2026 leak shows the same old design with some heavy-duty internals
item.description: A new Motorola Razr 2026 leak shows a familiar design but hints at big upgrades like up to 18GB RAM, 1TB storage, and a new telephoto camera.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: The Motorola Razr 2025 is brighter than even older Razr Plus models.
media:content.media:text: The Motorola Razr 2025 is brighter than even older Razr Plus models.

item.title: This Lenovo Chromebook was nearly perfect back in 2024, and now it's 57% OFF during Amazon Spring Deal Days

item.title: One brand now owns half the US foldable phone market, and it's not Samsung

item.title: Four reasons why the Nothing Phone 4a is the ideal mid-range upgrade in India
item.description: Nothing's Phone 4a costs a lot more this year, but you get a new 50MP tele lens, a main camera that takes much better photos, and a striking new design. Overall, this may just be the best phone in its category in India.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Nothing Phone 4a review on Android Central

item.title: Four phones you should buy instead of the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: Which Samsung Galaxy S26 model should you buy?
item.description: Samsung's Galaxy S26 family includes three phones again this year, but price hikes and a lack of upgrades on two models might just push you toward one.

item.title: These hidden Galaxy S26 features will save your eyes while scrolling at night
item.description: Samsung's Galaxy S26 Ultra has a very bright display, but several hidden options can help make it far more comfortable.
